generate.title: Create Your Post
generate.subtitle: Generate ideas, write text, and select platforms
generate.platformRequired: Please select at least one platform to continue
generate.selectPlatformError: Please select at least one platform
generate.postTooLong: Your text is too long. Keep it under {{max}} characters.
generate.aiIdeasDesc: Get 3 AI-generated post ideas based on your business and audience
generate.customTip: Tip: Be specific about what you want to post about. AI will help you create engaging content based on your topic.
generate.aiIdea1Text: This weekend only! Get 20% off all our products. Perfect time to treat yourself or find that special gift. Visit us in-store or shop online. Limited time offer!
generate.aiIdea1Photo: Bright photo showing popular products with "20% OFF" overlay
generate.aiIdea2Text: "Absolutely love this place! The quality is outstanding and the service is exceptional. Highly recommend!" - Maria K. Thank you for your amazing support!
generate.aiIdea2Photo: Happy customer testimonial photo with quote overlay
generate.aiIdea3Text: Fresh arrivals just landed! Check out our newest collection featuring the latest trends. Be the first to get your favorites before they sell out. Shop now!
generate.aiIdea3Photo: New products displayed attractively with "New" badge
generate.editAndImprove: Edit the generated text or write your own
generate.headline: Headline
generate.headlinePlaceholder: You don't need to add a headline — I'll suggest one from your text.
generate.headlinePrompt: What would you like to post today? 😊
generate.aISuggestionHeadline: All set! I’ve made a suggestion for you 🙌
generate.aISuggestionSubtitle: If you want to tweak anything, edit the text and I’ll help you from there.
generate.textSubtitle: It doesn't have to be perfect. Share your idea - and I'll finish the post for you.
generate.textPlaceholder: Write your idea or draft here...
generate.hashtagNote: Tap to enable or remove hashtags before publishing
generate.customHashtagLabel: Need another hashtag? Add your own
generate.customHashtagErrorEmpty: Write a hashtag before adding it
generate.customHashtagErrorFormat: Hashtag must contain at least two letters or numbers
generate.customHashtagErrorDuplicate: That hashtag is already in the list
generate.manualMode: Write yourself and get AI help
generate.manualModeDesc: Create your post content manually without AI assistance
generate.getAIHelp: Get AI help for your text
generate.addBusinessInfo: Tell us about your business – AI will make your posts much better.
generate.setupBusinessDescription: Add basic info or let AI read your website
generate.redirectToProfile: You will be sent to your profile page to add business information.
generate.businessInfoTitle: To help you best, I need to know a bit about your business.
generate.businessInfoDesc1: You can type it in yourself or let me check your website.
generate.businessInfoDesc2: This can always be changed later.
generate.upgradeMessage: to have AI enhance your text and choose tone and length for your posts
generate.facebookTip: Facebook tip: Longer posts with links work well. Use 2-3 hashtags.
generate.instagramTip: Instagram tip: Shorter captions with 10-15 hashtags. Focus on visual storytelling.
generate.aiAddition: Want to learn more? Contact us today!
